notes: Gemini re-test with h2_mode=1 (cascade shutdown + GOAWAY). Previous tests #259/#263/#285 all had cascade failure with h2_mode=2 + hold. Now using h2_mode=1, h2_end_stream=1, h2_goaway=1, h2_hold_request=0. Template is gemini protobuf-like format with )]}'\n\n prefix. 프롬프트 입력은 accessible edit field + send button click.
